name: Chocolate Snow Cap Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the first three dry ingredients.
2. Cream butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add eggs and mint extract to the mixture, mixing well.
4. Gradually add the melted bitter chocolate to the batter.
5. Alternate adding milk and the sifted dry ingredients into the batter, stirring after each addition.
6. Divide the dough in half and shape into 1-inch balls.
7. Roll each ball in powdered sugar.
8. Place on a greased cookie sheet and bake at 350°F for 12-15 minutes or until lightly cracked and golden brown.
These cookies will develop a cracked surface during baking, with the appearance of a "cracked" surface covered in powdered sugar on the higher parts.
